title: helianthemum glaucum f. suffruticosum
intro: Helianthemum glaucum f. suffruticosum, also known as rockrose, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helianthemum glaucum f. suffruticosum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
